text.title: Anti-Pattern Rationale Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Anti-Pattern Rationale Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: capture-instance
step.action: Record the UI surface and user-behaviour observation; pin the evidence link.

step.name: score-severity
step.action: Apply 0..4 severity using the heuristic-eval-severity-rubric methodology.

step.name: state-hypothesis
step.action: Write one-paragraph hypothesis explaining WHY this is an anti-pattern; cite at least one input by name.

step.name: recommend-action
step.action: Pick a recommended action: same-day-fix / next-sprint / backlog / discard.

step.name: assign-owner
step.action: Set a named owner; never plural.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run scripts/validate-anti-pattern-rationale-template.py; on pass, commit to the bank.
step.output: Stored artefact in the bank with version 1.0.0.
